data.name: Asset disposal procedures utilized
data.description: The company has electronic media containing confidential information purged or destroyed in accordance with best practices, and certificates of destruction are issued for each device destroyed.

data.name: Data retention procedures established
data.description: The company has formal retention and disposal procedures in place to guide the secure retention and disposal of company and customer data.

data.name: Production inventory maintained
data.description: The company maintains a formal inventory of production system assets.

data.name: Continuity and Disaster Recovery plans established
data.description: The company has Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Plans in place that outline communication plans in order to maintain information security continuity in the event of the unavailability of key personnel.

data.name: Continuity and Disaster Recovery plans tested
data.description: The company has a documented Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery (BC/DR) plan and tests it at least annually.

data.name: Configuration management system established
data.description: The company has a configuration management procedure in place to ensure that system configurations are deployed consistently throughout the environment.

data.name: Change management procedures enforced
data.description: The company requires changes to software and infrastructure components of the service to be authorized, formally documented, tested, reviewed, and approved prior to being implemented in the production environment.

data.name: Production deployment access restricted
data.description: The company restricts access to migrate changes to production to authorized personnel.

data.name: Development lifecycle established
data.description: The company has a formal systems development life cycle (SDLC) methodology in place that governs the development, acquisition, implementation, changes (including emergency changes), and maintenance of information systems and related technology requirements.

data.name: SOC 2 - System Description
data.description: Complete a description of your system for Section III of the audit report

data.name: Unique production database authentication enforced
data.description: The company requires authentication to production datastores to use authorized secure authentication mechanisms, such as unique SSH key.

data.name: Encryption key access restricted
data.description: The company restricts privileged access to encryption keys to authorized users with a business need.

data.name: Unique account authentication enforced
data.description: The company requires authentication to systems and applications to use unique username and password or authorized Secure Socket Shell (SSH) keys.

data.name: Data classification policy established
data.description: The company has a data classification policy in place to help ensure that confidential data is properly secured and restricted to authorized personnel.

data.name: Anti-malware technology utilized
data.description: The company deploys anti-malware technology to environments commonly susceptible to malicious attacks and configures this to be updated routinely, logged, and installed on all relevant systems.

data.name: Board oversight briefings conducted
data.description: The company's board of directors or a relevant subcommittee is briefed by senior management at least annually on the state of the company's cybersecurity and privacy risk. The board provides feedback and direction to management as needed.

data.name: Board charter documented
data.description: The company's board of directors has a documented charter that outlines its oversight responsibilities for internal control.

data.name: Board expertise developed
data.description: The company's board members have sufficient expertise to oversee management's ability to design, implement and operate information security controls. The board engages third-party information security experts and consultants as needed.

data.name: Board meetings conducted
data.description: The company's board of directors meets at least annually and maintains formal meeting minutes. The board includes directors that are independent of the company.

data.name: Backup processes established
data.description: The company's data backup policy documents requirements for backup and recovery of customer data.

data.name: System changes externally communicated
data.description: The company notifies customers of critical system changes that may affect their processing.

data.name: Management roles and responsibilities defined
data.description: The company management has established defined roles and responsibilities to oversee the design and implementation of information security controls.

data.name: Organization structure documented
data.description: The company maintains an organizational chart that describes the organizational structure and reporting lines.

data.name: Roles and responsibilities specified
data.description: Roles and responsibilities for the design, development, implementation, operation, maintenance, and monitoring of information security controls are formally assigned in job descriptions and/or the Roles and Responsibilities policy.

data.name: Security policies established and reviewed
data.description: The company's information security policies and procedures are documented and reviewed at least annually.

data.name: System changes communicated
data.description: The company communicates system changes to authorized internal users.

data.name: Employee background checks performed
data.description: The company performs background checks on new employees.

data.name: Code of Conduct acknowledged by employees and enforced
data.description: The company requires employees to acknowledge a code of conduct at the time of hire. Employees who violate the code of conduct are subject to disciplinary actions in accordance with a disciplinary policy.

data.name: Confidentiality Agreement acknowledged by employees
data.description: The company requires employees to sign a confidentiality agreement during onboarding.

data.name: Performance evaluations conducted
data.description: The company managers are required to complete performance evaluations for direct reports at least annually.

data.name: Production application access restricted
data.description: System access restricted to authorized access only

data.name: Access control procedures established
data.description:
The company's access control policy documents the requirements for the following access control functions: 

- adding new users;

- modifying users; and/or 

- removing an existing user's access.

data.name: Production database access restricted
data.description: The company restricts privileged access to databases to authorized users with a business need.

data.name: Firewall access restricted
data.description: The company restricts privileged access to the firewall to authorized users with a business need.

data.name: Production OS access restricted
data.description: The company restricts privileged access to the operating system to authorized users with a business need.

data.name: Production network access restricted
data.description: The company restricts privileged access to the production network to authorized users with a business need.

data.name: Access reviews conducted
data.description: The company conducts access reviews at least quarterly for the in-scope system components to help ensure that access is restricted appropriately. Required changes are tracked to completion.

data.name: Access revoked upon termination
data.description: The company completes termination checklists to ensure that access is revoked for terminated employees within SLAs.

data.name: Access requests required
data.description: The company ensures that user access to in-scope system components is based on job role and function or requires a documented access request form and manager approval prior to access being provisioned.

data.name: Unique network system authentication enforced
data.description: The company requires authentication to the "production network" to use unique usernames and passwords or authorized Secure Socket Shell (SSH) keys.

data.name: Password policy enforced
data.description: The company requires passwords for in-scope system components to be configured according to the company's policy.

data.name: Remote access MFA enforced
data.description: The company's production systems can only be remotely accessed by authorized employees possessing a valid multi-factor authentication (MFA) method.

data.name: Remote access encrypted enforced
data.description: The company's production systems can only be remotely accessed by authorized employees via an approved encrypted connection.

data.name: Control self-assessments conducted
data.description: The company performs control self-assessments at least annually to gain assurance that controls are in place and operating effectively. Corrective actions are taken based on relevant findings. If the company has committed to an SLA for a finding, the corrective action is completed within that SLA.

data.name: Incident response plan tested
data.description: The company tests their incident response plan at least annually.

data.name: Incident response policies established
data.description: The company has security and privacy incident response policies and procedures that are documented and communicated to authorized users.

data.name: Incident management procedures followed
data.description: The company's security and privacy incidents are logged, tracked, resolved, and communicated to affected or relevant parties by management according to the company's security incident response policy and procedures.

data.name: MDM system utilized
data.description: The company has a mobile device management (MDM) system in place to centrally manage mobile devices supporting the service.

data.name: Intrusion detection system utilized
data.description: The company uses an intrusion detection system to provide continuous monitoring of the company's network and early detection of potential security breaches.

data.name: Log management utilized
data.description: The company utilizes a log management tool to identify events that may have a potential impact on the company's ability to achieve its security objectives.

data.name: Infrastructure performance monitored
data.description: An infrastructure monitoring tool is utilized to monitor systems, infrastructure, and performance and generates alerts when specific predefined thresholds are met.

data.name: Data transmission encrypted
data.description: The company uses secure data transmission protocols to encrypt confidential and sensitive data when transmitted over public networks.

data.name: Network segmentation implemented
data.description: The company's network is segmented to prevent unauthorized access to customer data.

data.name: Network firewalls reviewed
data.description: The company reviews its firewall rulesets at least annually. Required changes are tracked to completion.

data.name: Network firewalls utilized
data.description: The company uses firewalls and configures them to prevent unauthorized access.

data.name: Network and system hardening standards maintained
data.description: The company's network and system hardening standards are documented, based on industry best practices, and reviewed at least annually.

data.name: Vulnerability and system monitoring procedures established
Company commitments externally communicated
data.description: The company's security commitments are communicated to customers in Master Service Agreements (MSA) or Terms of Service (TOS).

data.name: External support resources available
data.description: The company provides guidelines and technical support resources relating to system operations to customers.

data.name: Service description communicated
data.description: The company provides a description of its products and services to internal and external users.

data.name: Risk assessment objectives specified
data.description: The company specifies its objectives to enable the identification and assessment of risk related to the objectives.

data.name: Risks assessments performed
data.description: The company's risk assessments are performed at least annually. As part of this process, threats and changes (environmental, regulatory, and technological) to service commitments are identified and the risks are formally assessed. The risk assessment includes a consideration of the potential for fraud and how fraud may impact the achievement of objectives.

data.name: Risk management program established
data.description: The company has a documented risk management program in place that includes guidance on the identification of potential threats, rating the significance of the risks associated with the identified threats, and mitigation strategies for those risks.

data.name: Security awareness training implemented
data.description: The company requires employees to complete security awareness training within thirty days of hire and at least annually thereafter.

data.name: Third-party agreements established
data.description: The company has written agreements in place with vendors and related third-parties. These agreements include confidentiality and privacy commitments applicable to that entity.

data.name: Vendor management program established
data.description:
The company has a vendor management program in place. Components of this program include:

- critical third-party vendor inventory;

- vendor's security and privacy requirements; and

- review of critical third-party vendors at least annually.

data.name: Service infrastructure maintained
data.description: The company has infrastructure supporting the service patched as a part of routine maintenance and as a result of identified vulnerabilities to help ensure that servers supporting the service are hardened against security threats.

data.name: Vulnerabilities scanned and remediated
data.description: Host-based vulnerability scans are performed at least quarterly on all external-facing systems. Critical and high vulnerabilities are tracked to remediation.

data.name: Data encryption utilized
data.description: The company's datastores housing sensitive customer data are encrypted at rest.

data.name: Penetration testing performed
data.description: The company's penetration testing is performed at least annually. A remediation plan is developed and changes are implemented to remediate vulnerabilities in accordance with SLAs.

data.name: Code of Conduct acknowledged by contractors
data.description: The company requires contractor agreements to include a code of conduct or reference to the company code of conduct.

data.name: Customer data deleted upon leaving
data.description: The company purges or removes customer data containing confidential information from the application environment, in accordance with best practices, when customers leave the service.

data.name: Support system available
data.description: The company has an external-facing support system in place that allows users to report system information on failures, incidents, concerns, and other complaints to appropriate personnel.

data.name: Confidentiality Agreement acknowledged by contractors
data.description: The company requires contractors to sign a confidentiality agreement at the time of engagement.

data.name: Whistleblower policy established
data.description: The company has established a formalized whistleblower policy, and an anonymous communication channel is in place for users to report potential issues or fraud concerns.

data.name: Cybersecurity insurance maintained
data.description: The company maintains cybersecurity insurance to mitigate the financial impact of business disruptions.

data.name: Physical access processes established
data.description: The company has processes in place for granting, changing, and terminating physical access to company data centers based on an authorization from control owners.

data.name: Data center access reviewed
data.description: The company reviews access to the data centers at least annually.

data.name: Visitor procedures enforced
data.description: The company requires visitors to sign-in, wear a visitor badge, and be escorted by an authorized employee when accessing the data center or secure areas.

data.name: Portable media encrypted
data.description: The company encrypts portable and removable media devices when used.
